{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322021500FC8631F61601E31F715F"}"},"total":4055},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7201393377064747833","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个作者值得关注，高产爽文，可以看他那几本。👍👍👍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1676705188,"group_id":"7200319871941348407","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"听书——工作，两不误。好好学习，天天向上!😂😂😂","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5F9Yt098WHafLdBuYbvA0KxcTx/j4FFp8V8+zfbghUV","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a3366056ffcb4a9daab59ab83955da9e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706741&x-signature=yXg4OYy%2F6sRdZwdwjfZeLWn2tTk%3D","user_id":"1918022413191022","user_name":"江边一只笨鸟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1918022413191022","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7200319871941348407","book_info":{"abstract":"开局绑定无敌系统？
陈牧问：你有什么功能？
系统：【本系统完成任务，即可获得大量奖励，功法，金钱，神器……应有尽有，让宿主无敌！】
功法？我大伯乃是第一功法创造者，随手几笔，便是这世间最顶级的功法！
金钱？我老姐的商会生意，遍布整个大苍世界，富可敌国！
神器？我表弟十四岁已是远近闻名的炼器大师！
……
简单向系统介绍了一下自己的背景，陈牧摆摆手，“我家族这么无敌，你说，我要你何用？你自己解绑吧，我上辈子卷累了，重活一世，不想再卷了。”
本以为系统会死心，谁曾想，它居然因此自卑黑化，开始自动升级！
【系统升级成功！增加签到打卡模块！】
【系统升级成功！增加无限金钱模块！】
【系统升级成功！增加挂机升级模块！】
【系统升级成功！增加抽奖模块！】
